nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for ruvix-dma crate: hardware-agnostic DMA controller abstraction for the RuVix Cognition Kernel (ADR-087) supporting scatter-gather, cache coherency, and platform-agnostic transfers.

nodes.name: buffer.rs
nodes.summary: DMA buffer management for cache-coherent memory transfers with physical/virtual address tracking, alignment validation, and slice/chunk iteration.

nodes.name: DmaBufferFlags
nodes.summary: Flags controlling DMA buffer behavior (cache_coherent, readable, writable, contiguous, zero_init).

nodes.name: DmaBuffer
nodes.summary: Cache-coherent DMA buffer with physical/virtual address tracking, alignment, flags, and generation counter for cache invalidations.

nodes.name: DmaBufferChunks
nodes.summary: Iterator over fixed-size chunks of a DMA buffer yielding (physical_addr, size) pairs.

nodes.name: channel.rs
nodes.summary: DMA channel representation with atomic state machine (Free/Allocated/Configured/Running/Paused/Complete/Error), configuration setters, and scatter-gather support.

nodes.name: DmaChannelId
nodes.summary: Bounded u8 newtype for DMA channel identifiers, asserting id < MAX_DMA_CHANNELS.

nodes.name: ChannelState
nodes.summary: Internal repr(u8) channel state machine with transitions Free/Allocated/Configured/Running/Paused/Complete/Error.

nodes.name: DmaChannel
nodes.summary: DMA channel with atomic state, direction, src/dst addresses, transfer length, priority, and optional scatter-gather flag.

nodes.name: config.rs
nodes.summary: DMA configuration structures: transfer width, burst size, and full DmaConfig builder with mem-to-mem, mem-to-device, and device-to-mem presets.

nodes.name: DmaTransferWidth
nodes.summary: Data bus width enum (Byte/HalfWord/Word/DoubleWord/QuadWord) with bytes/bits conversion.

nodes.name: DmaBurstSize
nodes.summary: Burst size enum from Single to Burst256 transfers per burst, with bytes_per_burst calculation.

nodes.name: DmaConfig
nodes.summary: Comprehensive DMA transfer configuration with direction, addresses, width, burst, priority, circular mode, interrupts, and timeout.

nodes.name: controller.rs
nodes.summary: DmaController trait defining the platform-agnostic DMA interface (allocate, configure, start, poll, abort, sync_cache) and DmaControllerExt convenience methods (memcpy, write/read_device).

nodes.name: DmaController
nodes.summary: Trait defining the interface platform-specific DMA controllers must implement: channel allocation, configuration, start_transfer, poll_completion, abort, cache sync, and interrupt control.

nodes.name: DmaControllerExt
nodes.summary: Extension trait blanket-implemented for all DmaController types, providing memcpy, write_to_device, and read_from_device convenience methods with automatic channel management.

nodes.name: descriptor.rs
nodes.summary: DMA scatter-gather descriptor support with linked-list chain construction up to MAX_DESCRIPTOR_CHAIN_LENGTH segments.

nodes.name: DmaDescriptorFlags
nodes.summary: Bitflags for descriptor (last, interrupt, etc.) with middle/last/with_interrupt builders and u8 round-trip.

nodes.name: DmaDescriptor
nodes.summary: Single scatter-gather descriptor with src/dst addresses, length, flags, and next-pointer for linked-list chain traversal.

nodes.name: DmaDescriptorChain
nodes.summary: Builder/manager for scatter-gather descriptor chain with segment additions, total length tracking, and chain validation.

nodes.name: error.rs
nodes.summary: DmaError type and DmaResult alias with structured error kinds (alignment, timeout, channel_not_available, config_error) and Display impl.

nodes.name: DmaResult
nodes.summary: Type alias `Result<T, DmaError>` used throughout the crate.

nodes.name: DmaError
nodes.summary: Structured DMA error type with kind and optional address context; constructors for alignment, timeout, channel-not-available, and config errors.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: ruvix-dma crate root: re-exports submodules, defines DmaDirection/DmaStatus/DmaErrorKind enums and crate-wide constants (MAX_DMA_CHANNELS=16, MAX_DESCRIPTOR_CHAIN_LENGTH=256, DEFAULT_TRANSFER_TIMEOUT_US, DMA_BUFFER_ALIGNMENT=64).

nodes.name: DmaDirection
nodes.summary: Direction enum: MemToMem, MemToDevice, DeviceToMem, DeviceToDevice with reads_memory/writes_memory predicates.

nodes.name: DmaStatus
nodes.summary: Transfer status: Idle, Running, Complete, Error(kind), Paused, Aborted.

nodes.name: DmaErrorKind
nodes.summary: Error category enum used inside DmaError (alignment, timeout, channel-not-available, config, unknown, etc.).

nodes.name: prelude
nodes.summary: Convenience prelude re-exporting core dma types for users.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for ruvix-drivers crate providing ARM64 platform driver implementations (GIC, PL011, ARM generic timer, MMIO).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for ruvix-drivers: PL011 UART, GIC interrupt controller, ARM generic timer, and MMIO primitives with barriers (dsb, dmb, isb).

nodes.name: gic.rs
nodes.summary: GICv2 (ARM Generic Interrupt Controller) driver supporting up to 256 IRQs with enable/disable/acknowledge/end_of_interrupt/priority APIs and MMIO address validation.

nodes.name: GicError
nodes.summary: Error enum for GIC operations (invalid MMIO address, etc.).

nodes.name: mmio_validation
nodes.summary: Internal module validating GICD/GICC MMIO base addresses fall in allowed ranges.

nodes.name: Gic
nodes.summary: GICv2 driver with distributor + CPU interface base addresses; provides init, enable, disable, set_priority, acknowledge, end_of_interrupt, is_pending, and max_interrupts.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: ruvix-drivers crate root re-exporting Gic, Pl011, and ArmGenericTimer along with submodule access to mmio primitives.

nodes.name: prelude
nodes.summary: Convenience prelude re-exporting driver types.

nodes.name: mmio.rs
nodes.summary: MMIO primitives: dmb/dsb/isb memory barriers and typed volatile MmioReg<T> wrapper exposing read/write/modify.

nodes.name: dmb
nodes.summary: Data Memory Barrier intrinsic for ARM64 ensuring ordering of memory accesses.

nodes.name: dsb
nodes.summary: Data Synchronization Barrier intrinsic stalling until all prior memory accesses complete.

nodes.name: isb
nodes.summary: Instruction Synchronization Barrier flushing the pipeline.

nodes.name: MmioReg
nodes.summary: Generic typed MMIO register wrapper providing volatile read/write/modify operations.

nodes.name: pl011.rs
nodes.summary: ARM PL011 UART driver with 115200 8N1 default config; supports init, write_byte/read_byte, flush, RX interrupt enable/disable, and fmt::Write impl.

nodes.name: Pl011
nodes.summary: PL011 UART driver bound to an MMIO base address.

nodes.name: timer.rs
nodes.summary: ARM Generic Timer (EL1 physical) driver providing now_ns, now_ticks, set_compare, set_deadline_ns, set_timeout_ns, enable, disable, is_pending, and acknowledge.

nodes.name: ArmGenericTimer
nodes.summary: ARM Generic Timer abstraction over CNTPCT/CNTFRQ/CNTP_CVAL/CNTP_CTL system registers.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for ruvix-dtb device tree blob parser crate (no_std, zero-alloc).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for ruvix-dtb: zero-allocation FDT (Flattened Device Tree) parser supporting node lookup, properties, reg/compatible, and SoC discovery.

nodes.name: error.rs
nodes.summary: DtbError enum and DtbResult type alias covering invalid-magic, bad-version, truncated, malformed structure-block, and lookup errors.

nodes.name: DtbResult
nodes.summary: Type alias `Result<T, DtbError>` used throughout the DTB parser.

nodes.name: DtbError
nodes.summary: Variants for all DTB parsing errors with descriptive Display formatting.

nodes.name: header.rs
nodes.summary: FDT header (40-byte) parser with magic/version validation and accessors for structure/strings blocks and string-table lookup.

nodes.name: FdtHeader
nodes.summary: Parsed FDT header (magic, totalsize, off_dt_struct, off_dt_strings, version, boot_cpuid_phys) with validation and block accessors.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: ruvix-dtb crate root: re-exports DeviceTree/Node/Property/RegEntry, FDT_MAGIC/FDT_VERSION constants, FdtToken enum, and BE u32/u64 read + align4/strlen helpers.

nodes.name: FdtToken
nodes.summary: FDT structure-block token enum: BeginNode, EndNode, Prop, Nop, End.

nodes.name: read_be_u32
nodes.summary: Const big-endian u32 reader at a byte offset with bounds checking.

nodes.name: read_be_u64
nodes.summary: Const big-endian u64 reader at a byte offset with bounds checking.

nodes.name: align4
nodes.summary: Const 4-byte alignment rounding helper used to align structure-block offsets.

nodes.name: strlen
nodes.summary: Compute NUL-terminated string length within a byte slice starting at an offset.

nodes.name: prelude
nodes.summary: Convenience prelude re-exporting common DTB types.

nodes.name: node.rs
nodes.summary: Node abstraction over FDT nodes: name/unit-name/unit-address accessors, PathBuilder, NodeIter (with children_of/at_depth filters), and ParsedReg accessor.

nodes.name: Node
nodes.summary: Borrowed view of a parsed DTB node with name slice, content offset, depth, parent offset, and root predicate.

nodes.name: PathBuilder
nodes.summary: Fixed-capacity path string builder for traversing DTB node hierarchies (bounded by MAX_PATH_LEN).

nodes.name: NodeIter
nodes.summary: Iterator over parsed nodes with filters by children_of(parent) or at_depth(n).

nodes.name: ParsedReg
nodes.summary: Parsed `reg` property carrying data slice plus #address-cells and #size-cells for entry iteration.

nodes.name: parser.rs
nodes.summary: DeviceTree parser supporting up to 512 nodes and 16 path components, with find_node/find_compatible/find_by_name and typed property accessors (u32/u64/string/reg).

nodes.name: DeviceTree
nodes.summary: Parsed device tree wrapping a borrowed blob; iterates structure block to populate node table; entry-point via DeviceTree::parse.

nodes.name: CompatibleIter
nodes.summary: Iterator yielding nodes whose `compatible` property matches a given string.

nodes.name: NameIter
nodes.summary: Iterator yielding nodes whose name matches a given string.

nodes.name: property.rs
nodes.summary: Property/PropertyValue types with typed accessors (as_u32, as_u64, as_str, as_stringlist) plus RegEntry/RegIter parsing variable-width address-cells/size-cells encodings.

nodes.name: Property
nodes.summary: Borrowed DTB property with name and raw bytes; typed parsers for u32/u64/string/stringlist and a parse() heuristic returning a PropertyValue.

nodes.name: PropertyValue
nodes.summary: Auto-detected property variant: Empty, U32, U64, String, StringList, or RawBytes.

nodes.name: StringListIter
nodes.summary: Iterator over NUL-separated strings in a stringlist property.

nodes.name: RegEntry
nodes.summary: Single (address, size) pair from a `reg` property with end/contains helpers.

nodes.name: RegIter
nodes.summary: Iterator yielding RegEntry items from a reg-property byte slice, parameterized by address-cells and size-cells.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for ruvix-fs crate providing VFS, RamFs, FAT32, and BlockDevice abstractions.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for ruvix-fs: FileSystem trait, RamFs, Fat32Fs, MemoryBlockDevice/NullBlockDevice, VfsMountTable, and Path utilities.
